canonical_truth_summary: 规范项目当前处于晋级受阻阶段，真实主阻塞是 最大回撤 56.50% 高于 30.00%。；旧的“缺 bars”叙事已转为历史路径。
communication_preference: Use direct Chinese for human-facing summaries; name the strategy first and the system action second.
current_blocker: Primary blocker is still drawdown > 30%; benchmark wiring is fixed and ST effect is still unidentifiable on the frozen snapshot because ST exposure is zero.
current_capability_boundary: Research conclusions are now credible enough for strategy-level diagnosis, but not yet strong enough for promotion because all compared lines still fail the drawdown gate.
current_research_stage: 策略诊断 / 晋级受阻
current_strategy_summary: 本轮完成三条策略线在 `full_a_mainboard_incl_st` / `full_a_mainboard_ex_st` 两个宇宙上的同口径比较；建议主线改为 `risk_constrained_limit_up`，`baseline_limit_up` 保留为对照。
current_task: Clarify benchmark wiring, formalize dual universes, and compare three limit-up strategy lines under one validation frame.
default_project_data_status: ready coverage on current frozen snapshot; research profile `full_a_mainboard_incl_st` source_st_count=0.
durable_facts: Benchmark wiring is fixed: direct baseline diagnostics now receive explicit benchmark_series.
Current frozen symbols snapshot has zero ST exposure, so the new dual-universe comparison is policy-valid but empirically degenerate this round.
Main track candidate: risk_constrained_limit_up; control track: baseline_limit_up; deferred track: tighter_entry_limit_up.
effective_subagent_gate_reason: This run was a tightly coupled diagnostic path; serial work produced cleaner evidence than parallel subagents.

execution_queue.last_summary: Repo truth changed from `max_drawdown` to `none` after `data_validate`.
execution_queue.stop_condition: full refresh 后仍无新证据且 blocker 未缩小。
execution_queue.title: 恢复默认项目可用日频 bars

execution_queue.last_summary: `research_audit` did not produce a new verified state change.
execution_queue.prerequisite: 以当前 blocker 重新确认 repo truth。
execution_queue.stop_condition: 审计结果没有带来新的边界信息。
execution_queue.success_condition: 审计结果让下一轮选择更确定。
execution_queue.title: 刷新 repo truth 与审计基线

execution_queue.last_summary: `promote_candidate` clarified the current blocker without clearing it.
execution_queue.prerequisite: 默认项目具备可研究输入。
execution_queue.stop_condition: 输入仍不足，继续执行 ROI 过低。
execution_queue.success_condition: promotion 失败边界被重新确认或收窄。
execution_queue.title: 刷新晋级边界诊断

execution_queue.last_summary: Repo truth changed from `none` to `max_drawdown` after `agent_cycle_dry_run`.
execution_queue.prerequisite: 默认项目具备可研究输入。
execution_queue.stop_condition: dry-run 只重复旧 blocker 且没有新信息。
execution_queue.success_condition: dry-run 结果带来新的候选或 blocker 收敛。
execution_queue.title: 跑一次 dry-run control plane

iterative_loop.last_completed: 推进执行队列：恢复默认项目可用日频 bars、刷新晋级边界诊断、跑一次 dry-run control plane
iterative_loop.last_not_done: 刷新 repo truth 与审计基线
iterative_loop.next_recommendation: Decompose the baseline_limit_up drawdown and reconcile benchmark_missing:000001 before choosing the next branch validation.
iterative_loop.subagent_reason: The current work is still one bounded blocker: explain the drawdown and baseline discrepancy before splitting into parallel branches.

last_failed_capability: All three strategy lines still fail the 30% max-drawdown promotion threshold.

last_failure.corrective_action: Restore a usable frozen universe plus local bars before rerunning the dry-run cycle.
last_failure.summary: Promotion gate blocked: Max drawdown 56.50% exceeds 30.00%.

last_verified_capability: This run completed benchmark diagnosis, dual-universe comparison, baseline drawdown attribution, and three-line strategy comparison under one evaluation frame.

latest_hypotheses.hypothesis: as_share_research_v1: investigate the highest-severity failed gate before running a live experiment

negative_memory: Do not reopen generic benchmark_missing diagnosis unless explicit baselines fall below pass again.
Do not treat current ST result as proof that ST never matters; the frozen snapshot currently has zero ST exposure.
Do not over-explain drawdown with universe stories before the frozen symbols source is widened beyond the current degenerate snapshot.
next_priority_action: 下一步唯一最高优先建议：只围绕 `risk_constrained_limit_up` 做一次更细的组合风险拆解，先确认它的回撤改善来自持仓预算收缩而不是样本偶然性。
next_step_memory: Restore a usable validated bar snapshot for the frozen default universe.
Break down whether drawdown comes from time-window concentration, name concentration, or long holding tails.
下一步唯一最高优先建议：只围绕 `risk_constrained_limit_up` 做一次更细的组合风险拆解，先确认它的回撤改善来自持仓预算收缩而不是样本偶然性。
先拆解 baseline_limit_up（涨停主线基线分支） 的回撤根因，再决定优先验证 risk_constrained_limit_up（涨停主线风控分支） 还是 tighter_entry_limit_up（涨停主线收紧入场分支）。
Decompose the baseline_limit_up drawdown into time-window concentration, single-name concentration, and holding-tail length before choosing the next branch validation.
project_identity_notice: 历史项目名 2026Q1_limit_up 仅作为 legacy alias / 迁移记录保留，不再代表当前活跃项目。

dimensions.evidence: validated bars ready but ST exposure on frozen snapshot is zero
three strategy lines are now directly comparable
same benchmark, same cost, same promotion frame
serial diagnostics were higher ROI this run

stage0a_decision.decision_reason: Recoverable symbols 715 meet the readiness floor 680; keep the frozen universe and retry transient failures first.
stage0a_decision.next_action: Retry transient bar recovery for 0 symbols listed in the coverage-gap ledger before changing the frozen universe.

blocked_by: Promotion is currently blocked: max drawdown 50.44% exceeds 30.00%, and direct promote_candidate also reports benchmark_missing:000001.
strategy_candidates.core_hypothesis: 过去一段时间反复出现涨停、随后回到突破起点附近的主板个股，后续更容易再次走强；先把这条主线稳定保存成基线，再评估其它改法。
strategy_candidates.economic_rationale: A 股主板里的涨停通常意味着资金短时间集中抢筹。若个股涨停后没有彻底转弱，而是在突破起点附近重新整理，说明强势资金可能仍在，后续二次启动概率更高；保留基线则能判断后续改动到底是在修复风险还是只是在制造噪音。
strategy_candidates.kill_criteria: 如果可用输入恢复后，这条主线在泄漏、可交易性、walk-forward 与成本压力检查下仍无法把最大回撤压到 30% 以内，就停止继续把它当主线。
strategy_candidates.latest_action: No new strategy validation this run; only canonical identity and blocker cleanup.
strategy_candidates.latest_result: Still blocked by max drawdown 50.44% > 30.00% and benchmark_missing:000001 in direct promote_candidate.
strategy_candidates.name: 涨停主线基线分支
strategy_candidates.next_validation: Decompose drawdown and reconcile benchmark_missing:000001 before choosing the next branch validation.
strategy_candidates.required_data: 主板 A 股日频 OHLCV、上市天数、ST/板块过滤、涨停代理、下个交易日收益、基准与等权基线。

blocked_by: Promotion is currently blocked: max drawdown 50.44% exceeds 30.00%, and direct promote_candidate also reports benchmark_missing:000001.
strategy_candidates.core_hypothesis: 在不破坏涨停回踩再启动这个主线定义的前提下，更严格的止损、市场过滤或持仓约束可以显著降低回撤。
strategy_candidates.economic_rationale: 如果主线 alpha 来自强势股二次启动，而不是单纯硬扛波动，那么更强的风险约束应该先砍掉最差交易，同时保住大部分有效信号。
strategy_candidates.kill_criteria: 如果回撤改善很弱、但收益和通过率明显恶化，就停止继续扩大这条风控分支。
strategy_candidates.latest_action: No new strategy validation this run; waiting for the baseline_limit_up blocker decomposition.
strategy_candidates.latest_result: No new decision delta; the branch stays secondary and blocked.
strategy_candidates.name: 涨停主线风控分支
strategy_candidates.next_validation: Choose branch priority only after the main-track blocker decomposition is written back.
strategy_candidates.required_data: 主板 A 股日频 OHLCV、上市天数、ST/板块过滤、涨停代理、下个交易日收益、基准与等权基线。

blocked_by: Promotion is currently blocked: max drawdown 50.44% exceeds 30.00%, and direct promote_candidate also reports benchmark_missing:000001.
strategy_candidates.core_hypothesis: 把入选阈值收紧，只保留更接近再次启动位置的个股，可以减少过早买入带来的假突破和大回撤。
strategy_candidates.economic_rationale: 如果真正的二次启动往往发生在更接近突破起点、筹码更集中的位置，那么收紧入场条件应该先减少质量差的提前埋伏。
strategy_candidates.kill_criteria: 如果收紧入场后只是在减少交易次数，却没有改善回撤或收益质量，就停止继续扩展这条分支。

strategy_candidates.core_hypothesis: 先把旧 `agent_cycle` 兼容跑通，再谈更复杂的多分支研究。
strategy_candidates.economic_rationale: 这不是市场行为假设，只是为了兼容旧控制面而保留的一条过渡路径。
strategy_candidates.kill_criteria: 只要旧单分支兼容不再是必须前提，就不要再把它当作策略研究候选。

subagent_continue_reason: The current work is still a single-path drawdown blocker and reporting cleanup, so parallel subagents are not justified.

subagent_last_event.summary: Task breadth is below the minimum threshold for safe decomposition.

subagent_operating_preference: Manage subagents dynamically in real time. Default effectively OFF. Escalate to LIGHT or FULL only when the task truly benefits from parallel work, then pause or retire transient workers as soon as their bounded job is done.

subagent_plan.no_split_reason: Task breadth is below the minimum threshold for safe decomposition.
subagent_plan.rationale: The work is still narrow enough for one integrating agent.
